'''''Escape from the Monster Ship: A Droid Adventure''''' is a [[1986]] children's book written by [[Bonnie Bogart]] and illustrated by [[Amador (artist)|Amador]]. It adapts the [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] episode entitled "[[Tail of the Roon Comets]]," which was written by [[Michael Reaves]], based on a story by [[Ben Burtt]].
